category_sources: Official Apache Ivy homepage describes Ivy as a dependency manager focused on flexibility and simplicity.
display_name_sources: Apache documentation and trademarks identify Apache Ivy.
Official homepage heading uses Apache Ivy.
docs_sources: Official Ivy documentation says it is the official Ivy documentation and includes tutorials, reference, and developer docs.
repo_sources: Official Apache Ant Git Repositories page lists Ivy as https://gitbox.apache.org/repos/asf/ant-ivy.git.
Official Apache Ivy download page gives the git clone URL for latest sources.
source_facts.repo is empty, so repo was researched.
tags_sources: Official docs describe Ivy as managing, resolving, and reporting project dependencies with tight Apache Ant integration.
